question: What percentage of the countryside property's price is the cost of the renovations I plan to do on my current house?

retrieval_results.context:
User is planning renovations to their current house.
User estimates the cost of renovations to be around $20,000.
User plans a $20,000 renovation budget that includes adding a deck and a patio.
User plans to start renovation project in the spring.
User wants to estimate the impact of renovations on their property taxes.
User wants to minimize the impact of renovations on property taxes.
User wants to understand how renovations affect property taxes.
Property value appreciation in the area can amplify the impact of renovations on property taxes.
User can phase the renovation project to minimize the impact on property taxes.
User expects the deck and patio renovations to have a moderate impact on property taxes.
